## Description

Provide a clear and concise description of the changes proposed in this Pull Request.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Chore / Documentation / Engineering config refinement

## Verification Plan

Describe the testing performed to verify your changes.

### Automated Tests
- Run `pnpm run build`
- Run `pnpm run lint`
- Run `pnpm run test`

### Manual Verification
- Describe any manual testing steps executed.

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the code style and guidelines of this project.
- [ ] My changes compile and build successfully.
- [ ] I have added/updated unit tests to cover my changes.
- [ ] All new and existing tests pass.
